acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] All identified consumers migrated
- [ ] Existing model/fuzz workflows build
- [ ] No daemon-internal imports remain in migrated consumers
description:
**Problem**
External consumers are pinned to old daemon-internal paths.
design: Update imports/adapters in stateright models, fuzz targets, and model adapters to shared crate.
title: Migrate stateright/fuzz/model adapters to shared daemon-core crate

acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] `Request::info()` (or equivalent) exists and is the **only** match that maps requests → repo/namespace/actor/read/op.
- [ ] `RequestContext::from_request()` and `read_gate_request()` are removed from `crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/server.rs`.
- [ ] Tracing spans include the same fields/values as before for all ops.
- [ ] Read gate behavior is unchanged for all ops.
- [ ] `cargo test` passes.
description:
**Problem**
IPC request metadata is extracted in multiple places with large, partially overlapping matches:
- `crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/server.rs` has `RequestContext::from_request()` for span metadata and `read_gate_request()` for read gating.
- `crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/coord.rs` has the big request dispatch match that re-states which ops are mutation/read/repo-only.
This duplication makes it easy to forget to update one path when new ops are added, causing silent drift in logging or read-gate coverage.

**Design**
After the ctx/payload refactor (bd-ebhh), introduce a single request metadata extraction path and route all span + read-gate logic through it.

1) Add a shared metadata carrier:
- `RequestInfo` (or `RequestExt`) with fields:
  - `op: &'static str` (request type string for tracing)
  - `repo: Option<&Path>`
  - `namespace: Option<&str>`
  - `actor_id: Option<&str>`
  - `client_request_id: Option<&str>`
  - `read: Option<&ReadConsistency>`
- Implement `Request::info(&self) -> RequestInfo<'_>` using a **single match** on `Request` variants.
  - Mutations use `MutationCtx` fields.
  - Reads use `ReadCtx` fields.
  - Repo-only ops use `RepoCtx` with no namespace/read.
  - Admin flush/checkpoint read namespace from payload (not `ReadCtx`).
  - `Ping`/`Shutdown` return `None` repo.

2) Add convenience methods on `Request`:
- `read_gate(&self) -> Option<ReadGateRequest>` built from `RequestInfo` (repo + read), to fully replace the current `read_gate_request()` match.
- (Optional) `request_type(&self) -> &'static str` if it helps keep spans simple.

3) Update server span + read gate logic:
- Replace `RequestContext::from_request()` usage with `request.info()`.
- Delete `RequestContext` struct entirely if no longer needed.
- Replace `read_gate_request()` with the new `Request::read_gate()`.
- Keep `read_consistency_tag()` and its semantics intact, but feed it from `RequestInfo.read`.

4) Ensure the op names used in spans are **exactly** the current names (e.g., "add_labels", "admin_reload_limits").

**Design Notes**
- This is strictly a refactor: no wire format or behavior changes.
- The single match should live in one place. Prefer `beads-surface` if it’s useful across crates, or a daemon-only extension (e.g., `crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/ipc/request_info.rs`) if we want to keep it internal.
- Pay special attention to Admin ops with namespace payloads and to read-gated operations: the read gate coverage must remain identical.

**Files**
- `crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/server.rs`
- `crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/ipc/mod.rs` (if adding extension helpers)
- `crates/beads-surface/src/ipc/types.rs` (if implementing `Request::info` there)
- `crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/server.rs` tests (span/read-gate coverage)
title: Centralize IPC request metadata extraction

description: Address two review findings: (1) NO_WARNING_ONLY_COMPATIBILITY_GATES must catch inverted if/else mismatch branches, and (2) ROTATE_REQUIRES_REBIND must require reload on every success path, not just any path. Also fix checkpoint_import ui normalize-stderr pattern to avoid fragile line-number fixtures.
title: Fix lint false-negatives in compat-gates and rotate-rebind

acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] It is impossible to construct a dep add/remove op with `from == to` without a fallible conversion.
- [ ] Wire serialization remains backward-compatible (same JSON fields).
- [ ] `validate_event_body_semantics` no longer needs a self-dep check.
- [ ] Existing dep-related tests pass; add at least one compile-time or conversion test for self-dep rejection.
description:
**Problem**
Dependency self-edges are only prevented by runtime validation (`validate_event_body_semantics` checks `from == to`). Yet the domain already has `DepKey::new` which makes self-deps impossible. Wire ops (`WireDepAddV1`/`WireDepRemoveV1`) still carry raw `from/to/kind`, so invalid states are representable until runtime. This makes it easy for new codepaths to forget validation and introduce self-deps, and it violates the “information holds its shape” / “types tell the truth” principles.

Key references:
- `crates/beads-core/src/dep.rs:52` — `DepKey::new` enforces non-self.
- `crates/beads-core/src/event.rs:2371` — runtime self-dep check.
- `crates/beads-core/src/wire_bead.rs:683` — wire dep ops store raw `from/to/kind`.

Severity: Self-deps are logically invalid and can cause cycle detection/path logic to misbehave. Relying on runtime checks here is fragile and non-local.
design:
**Design**
Represent dependency operations in terms of `DepKey` (or a `NonSelfDepKey` newtype) so self-deps are unrepresentable.

1) Introduce `NonSelfDepKey(DepKey)` (or reuse `DepKey` directly) with serde that preserves the existing wire shape `{from,to,kind}`.
2) Update `WireDepAddV1`/`WireDepRemoveV1` to store `key: NonSelfDepKey` and expose accessors for `from/to/kind`.
3) Provide serde impls that encode/decode to the same JSON layout to maintain compatibility.
4) Update `TxnOpV1::key()` and any dep handling to use the new key field.
5) Remove the self-dep check in `validate_event_body_semantics` once it’s structurally impossible, leaving only the tombstone lineage validation.

Migration notes:
- If serde compatibility is risky, add `#[serde(flatten)]` with a custom proxy to preserve wire form.
- Add a small conversion layer for old tests/fixtures if needed.
title: Make dependency ops carry non-self DepKey in wire types
